meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve can't scale projects (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't scale projects. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Project Template: Scale Your First AI App
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with scaling issues. Learn to use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to build professional-grade AI apps for your portfolio.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template solves scaling bottlenecks by providing a production-ready, modular architecture that abstracts complex deployment logic. By combining this framework with Claude Code, you automate boilerplate setup and infrastructure configuration, allowing you to focus entirely on building high-value AI features rather than debugging environment architecture.
content.intro:
You’ve spent weeks crafting your first AI application, but as soon as you add a new feature, the code feels like a house of cards. You're trapped in a cycle of refactoring, struggling to scale your logic, and wondering why your simple project feels like a monolith of technical debt. This is the 'Beginner’s Wall'—and it’s exactly where most students quit.

But the best engineers don't build from scratch; they leverage architectural leverage. By adopting the Antigravity project template, you inherit a professional-grade structure that enforces modularity and scalability from day one. When you pair this with Claude Code, you aren't just writing lines of code; you are orchestrating an AI-assisted development workflow that turns your ambitious ideas into production-ready software.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Start by bootstrapping your environment with the Antigravity core. This ensures your directory structure adheres to clean architecture principles.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the standard Antigravity template for a TypeScript-based AI application with modular service layers.

steps.title: Define Domain Services
steps.description: Decouple your business logic from external APIs. This allows you to swap AI models or databases without rewriting your entire codebase.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a service layer architecture for a chat-based AI feature, separating the prompt engineering logic from the message persistence layer.

steps.title: Configure Scaling Middleware
steps.description: Implement rate limiting and request queuing at the middleware level to prevent your app from crashing under load.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the Antigravity middleware to handle request throttling and error logging for AI-heavy operations.

steps.title: Integrate AI Context Injection
steps.description: Use the template's built-in context manager to feed relevant data to your LLM, ensuring your AI responses are accurate and scalable.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement a context injection pattern using Antigravity's DataPipeline class to format user input for Claude 3.5 Sonnet.

steps.title: Automate Deployment Readiness
steps.description: Finalize your project with production-ready environment variables and CI/CD configuration files.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a production deployment manifest that includes environment validation and CI/CD workflow hooks.

pro_tips: Always use the 'Atomic Service' pattern: if a file grows over 200 lines, move logic into a new service class immediately.
Leverage Claude Code's '--dry-run' flag before applying complex refactors to see exactly which files will be modified.
Keep your prompt templates in a dedicated /prompts directory; never hardcode instructions inside your application logic.
Use Antigravity's built-in mock testing to validate your AI services without burning API credits during development.
Treat your project structure like a product; the better your directory organization, the easier it is to showcase on your portfolio.
content.next_steps: After deployment, focus on adding observability by integrating tools like LangSmith to track your AI's performance and usage patterns.
content.conversion_block: You now have the structural foundation to build apps that don't just work, but scale. Stop letting technical debt hold you back from your potential as a software engineer. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
